executives.name: Gerard Bond
executives.background: Mr. Bond was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of OceanaGold in April 2022. He has over 25 years of experience in the global financial and resources industry, including 10 years at Newcrest Mining Limited as Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to Newcrest, he held senior executive roles at BHP Billiton.

executives.name: Edward (Marius) van Niekerk
executives.background: Mr. van Niekerk was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in February 2023. He has more than 25 years of experience in the mining and metals industry, having held senior financial leadership roles at Newmont Corporation and BHP Billiton.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Peter Steenkamp
executives.background: Mr. Steenkamp was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer in October 2023. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Harmony Gold Mining Company and African Rainbow Minerals.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Liang Tang
executives.background: Ms. Tang is the Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Company Secretary. She joined OceanaGold in 2009 and has over 20 years of experience in legal and corporate governance within the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Company Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Paul Benson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Benson was appointed as Chairman of the Board in October 2021. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including serving as CEO and Managing Director of SSR Mining Inc. and CEO of Troy Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Gerard Bond
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bond is the President and CEO of OceanaGold. See executive profile for further details.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Reid
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Reid is an experienced director and former senior executive with over 30 years in the resources and chemicals industries, including a long career with Orica Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Catherine Gignac
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Gignac has over 30 years of experience in capital markets and the mining industry. She has served as a mining equity research analyst and held various director roles in mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Mick McMullen
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McMullen is a mining professional with over 25 years of experience. He was previously the CEO and President of Detour Gold Corporation and CEO of Stillwater Mining Company.

board_of_directors.name: Sandra Dodds
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Dodds has over 25 years of experience in operational and financial roles across various industries including infrastructure and mining services.

board_of_directors.name: Alan Pangbourne
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Pangbourne has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Guyanese Gold Corp and Kinross Gold Corporation.

sources.source_description: Annual Information Form for the year ended December 31, 2023
